ogTitle: Neerim East vs Neerim Junction: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Neerim East and Neerim Junction.
heading: Neerim East vs Neerim Junction — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Neerim East, Victoria and Neerim Junction, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neerim Junction has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Neerim East (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Neerim East or Neerim Junction safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Neerim East has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Neerim Junction scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Neerim East scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Neerim Junction scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Neerim East or Neerim Junction?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neerim Junction has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
